name: Hammerex Marker Belt Holder
description: Compact leather marker belt holder — reinforced stud supports, fits markers of all sizes, low-profile design for belts up to 60mm.
overview:
**Simple. Effective. Compact.**

The Hammerex Marker Belt Holder is designed to carry markers of all sizes while requiring minimal belt space. Crafted from durable leather with reinforced stud supports, it offers secure retention and long-lasting performance.

Compatible with belts up to 6 cm wide, it's the perfect low-profile solution for keeping your marker within easy reach.

features.label: Reinforced stud supports for secure retention
Long-lasting performance for daily site use

purchase_notes: Low-profile design — pairs easily with other belt holders.
UK delivery available — international shipping quoted on request.
subtitle: COMPACT MARKER STATION
